name: Bulgogi #2
recipeIngredient: 2 lb boneless meat from beef - short ribs, more or less, sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the meat in a wok.
2. Stir and heat until well combined.
3. Add the meat to the mixture.
4. Cook, stirring constantly, until no longer red.
5. Be careful not to overcook, as this can toughen the meat.
Note: Any good, tender grade or cut of lean beef would serve equally well.
